response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with embedded C programming, Linux kernel modifications, and networking/switch security technologies required for the role. While they have strong software engineering skills in other languages and domains, their background does not align closely with the embedded networking or security features focus of this position.
strengths: Strong software development experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven ability to work in collaborative and technical teams
Experience with Linux and system-level development
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C for embedded or UNIX development
No evidence of Linux kernel modification or security feature development
Lacks direct experience with networking switch technologies or protocols (e.g., MACsec, NETCONF)

key_factors.factor: Linux kernel modification and security feature development
